summary: Tested company_id/URL slug update bug fix. All features verified working: company_id 'kewalbansing' is correctly used in URLs, backend APIs return correct company_id, frontend displays 'Huidige URL: /vastgoed/kewalbansing' in Instellingen tab, all admin tabs work, Kopieer URL button present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Company slug 'kewalbansing' is working correctly. The bug fix for company_id update when name changes has been verified. All kiosk URLs use the new slug format.

PASS - Returns company info with company_id: kewalbansing
PASS - Returns valid: true with token

bug_fix_verification.issue: When company name changes, the URL/slug should also update
bug_fix_verification.details: Company slug 'kewalbansing' is correctly used throughout the application. The backend auth.py endpoint handles company_id cascade when name changes. Frontend CompanyDetailsSection shows URL preview under Bedrijfsnaam field.
